title: Credit game
content:
{{Top|leg}}
[[File:Credit_Game.jpg|thumb|right|250px|R2-D2 beating the credit game]]
{{Quote|Really? You only wanted to learn how the credit game worked?|[[C-3PO/Legends|C-3PO]] to R2-D2|<ref name="Star Wars Droids: The Protocol Offensive">''[[The Protocol Offensive]]''</ref>}}
The '''credit game''' was a gambling device that required players to match symbols in order to win credits. Color variations of the credit game included blue, green, purple, and red.

Level Seven, the game room of the [[Tahlboor space station]], was equipped with at least five credit game machines. Around [[6 BBY/Legends|5.5 BBY]], [[R2-D2/Legends|R2-D2]] beat the game, winning enough credits to break the station's bank.

==Behind the scenes==
The credit game appears to be similar in concept to a [[Wikipedia:Slot machine|slot machine]].

==Appearances==
*''[[The Protocol Offensive]]''
